allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; runs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['jobs']; [print\(j['name'], j['conclusion'], [s['name'] for s in j['steps'] if s.get\('conclusion'\) == 'failure']\) for j in runs]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for j in data['jobs']: failed = [s['name'] for s in j['steps'] if s.get\('conclusion'\) == 'failure'] print\(j['name'], '|', j.get\('conclusion','pending'\), '|', failed\) ")
Bash(awk '/^ok/{pkg=$2; cov=$5; gsub\(/%/,"",cov\); if \(cov+0 < 50\) print cov+0"\\t"pkg}')

Bash(awk '/^mode:/{next} {split\($1,a,":"\); pkg=a[1]; gsub\(/\\/[^\\/]+\\.go$/,"",pkg\); stmts[$pkg]+=$3; covered[$pkg]+=$3*\($2>0?1:0\)} END {for\(p in stmts\) printf "%d/%d\\t%s\\n", covered[p], stmts[p], p}' coverage.out)
Bash(wc -l auth/scim/*.go selfupdate/*.go otel/*.go config/config.go notify/*.go)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Branch protection enabled, required checks:', [c['context'] for c in d.get\('required_status_checks',{}\).get\('contexts',[]\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(r['name'],r['status'],r.get\('conclusion',''\),r['headSha'][:8]\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
